description: Composition Grey sweatshirt made of 80% cotton and 20% polyester fleece with front zip opening, hood with pink lining and drawcord laces, long sleeves with ribbed cuffs, front hand-warmer pockets, a ribbed hem and lion embroidery on chest Fit Comfort Wash care Machine wash separately Do not bleach, do not dry clean, do not tumble dry Warm iron Keep cosy in the cold with this sweatshirt from myntra. Lovely warm fleece fabric is soft against your skin and gives you insulation against the winter weather. The practical zip opening makes this an easy top layer to put on or take off when the weather changes. Wear it as a top layer over your Sports kit or over a T-shirt and jeans for a relaxed, casual look. Model statistics The product is a a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18”
